text: @hyperseref but can intent be inferred from memory? I believe so. i've tasked a model to infer my intentions and long-term goals and values just from my browsing history. the trickier thing may be inferring the right intent schema for a given context.

raw.full_text: @hyperseref but can intent be inferred from memory? I believe so. i've tasked a model to infer my intentions and long-term goals and values just from my browsing history. the trickier thing may be inferring the right intent schema for a given context.

text: @hyperseref 'schema' was a way to say we that 'intent' can mean different things in different contexts. in a browser context, intents are tasks we want to fulfill, whereas with a recommender system it can mean interests we want to follow.

raw.full_text: @hyperseref 'schema' was a way to say we that 'intent' can mean different things in different contexts. in a browser context, intents are tasks we want to fulfill, whereas with a recommender system it can mean interests we want to follow.
